Swordfish Bill  
 

Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 4 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 4
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 6.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR RNG SHD BRD ROG BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

# Oct 20 2004 at 2:57 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum
277 posts
This is for those pet casters who come here and have no weapons on hand to give to their pet.
▲ Page top
Lame Drops
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2004 at 4:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774062108
60 posts
Its entirely frustrating to see such items as the Swordfish bill drop in zones where those there dont even want to loot them. They've got better already and if twinking an alt, they'd not give em this. This is lame in a newb zone even. Like the scroll of worthless code for no drop items that a self respecting player wouild already have better, and if buying would even want better. Like +3 to stats and/or resists with a minimum level of 45. Cmon.. if you still have +3 gear at leavel 45 is cause youve twinked a weapon and fungi on something and nothng else matters till 50+, and you sure as heck arent looking for +3 on anything on what yu get. Since it would break the game to replace these worthless item drops with trade goods, a less frequent drop of a level pertinent item, a click device that wouild be nice and actually useful, something..... dam, anything but what is obviously a way to hurt the overall pride in doing a camp or killing a mob even. How you feel after all the prep / travel / clearing / final kill ... to have a drop that laughs at you ? It would save code to eliminate the crap like that entirely. What real use is a Swordfish Bill ? Hell... even running charter / tournement boats i found only two good uses of a bill... on a fish's face on some wall... or hollow it and make a pipe. Cant do anything with the ones here. There is a clue as to what it may be good for though... Range 40., throw it away .
▲ Page top
not even any good for...
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2003 at 1:26 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1673223431707
Scholar
43 posts
A_random_merchant tells you, 'I'll give you 4 gold 7 silver 6 copper for the Swordfish Bill.'
▲ Page top
Extra Bad Vendor Loot?
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2002 at 3:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766425038
Scholar
20 posts
Is this used in anything? We found this in Siren's and are *really* disappointed.
▲ Page top
Can someone not ask?
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2002 at 10:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766425038
Scholar
20 posts
'Twas but an honest question, with all the quest items and such in the higher zones, we were saddened to see such lowbie loot. Just curious as to other's knowledge. No need for sarcasm.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 02 2002 at 7:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) It's a freaking fish's bill, that drops on almost every fish, what did you want? ROFL, was this post a joke?
